es.example: Perdona, ¿qué decías? Estaba en las nubes.
es.exampleTranslation: Sorry, what were you saying? I was off in the clouds.

it.text: Avere la testa tra le nuvole
it.literal: to have one's head among the clouds
it.meaning: To be absent-minded; not paying attention.
it.example: Oggi non riesco a concentrarmi, ho la testa tra le nuvole.
it.exampleTranslation: I can't focus today, my head's in the clouds.

bridge.note: Same metaphor, different grammar: Spanish puts you in the clouds; Italian puts only your head there.

interference.es_to_it: Italian takes avere here, not essere — ho la testa tra le nuvole.

review.notes: Source spot-checked in Treccani; RAE entry not opened. Direction of warning assigned es→it on import; reviewer to confirm.
